text: Tom and his dad share some sweets in the ratio 1:2. They have 12 sweets altogether. How many sweets does Tom get?
generatorSolution: The ratio is 1:2, so there are 1 + 2 = 3 equal parts in total. There are 12 sweets altogether. Each part = 12 ÷ 3 = 4 sweets. Tom gets 1 part, so Tom gets 4 sweets.
